Description: Create an EC2 instance with a security group allowing HTTP access from a specific IP address.

LatestAmiId.Description: The latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI from the Parameter store

InstanceType.ConstraintDescription: must be a valid EC2 instance type.

MyIP.Description: Your IP address in CIDR notation (e.g., 203.0.113./32)
MyIP.ConstraintDescription: must be a valid CIDR range of the form x.x.x.x/x.

KeyName.Description: Existing EC2 Key Pair name in us-east-1 (for SSH)

SubnetId.Description: Public Subnet (auto-assign public IP on launch = true)

Properties.GroupDescription: Allow HTTP access via my IP address

Fn::Base64.Fn::Sub:
#!/bin/bash yum update -y yum install -y httpd systemctl start httpd systemctl enable httpd echo '

Hello ATU!

' > /var/www/html/index.html
